title: verbena cajamarcensis
intro: Verbena cajamarcensis, also known as mountain verbena, is a flowering plant in the Verbena genus native to the highlands of Peru and Ecuador. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Verbena cajamarcensis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared for use in herbal remedies through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
